name: Bobby Cooke Golf Academy
address: 1410 Charlestown New Albany Rd Suite 201, Jeffersonville, IN 47130
about: Bobby Cooke Golf Academy is an indoor golf facility offering professional swing analysis using cutting-edge technology and the expertise of PGA Professionals. The venue provides a space for golfers of all skill levels to improve their game through objective analysis and execution on industry-leading simulators of the world's best courses. It also emphasizes the entertainment aspect of golf, creating a gratifying experience for friends and families regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional swing evaluations with expert instructors
Access to top-tier simulator technology for realistic play
BYOB policy and food options for a relaxed social experience
Membership program for discounts and priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons can order great food onsite.
BYOB policy is in effect, allowing guests to bring their own drinks.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, but it is common for indoor facilities to offer rental clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYOB (bring your own beverages) policy and allows patrons to order food.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but playing on simulators is generally faster than on a real course, typically taking around 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions a 'family fun' atmosphere, but does not specify if there are dedicated amenities or programs for children.
